{{Quote|We will find them and kill them.You have my word.|Slak Sagar|<ref name="Star Wars: Lethal Alliance">''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Slak Sagar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] serving with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In the months prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was [[Zarien Kheev]]'s main henchman on a hijacked research vessel situated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

While there, he was tasked with performing experiments on a new drug, using captured research scientists as the subjects. The drug was meant to increase workers performance on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], where the Empire was using workers to mine [[Mirkanite/Legends|mirkanite]], a material used in the construction of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]—and obviously intended for use aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. When [[Rianna Saren]], a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] hired by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], infiltrated the research ship and destroyed the drug, Sagar ordered his men to shut down the operation and promised [[Zarien Kheev]] to find the intruders. He battled Rianna Saren on a landing platform and was killed by her. Before she left, Rianna stole his [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] to use as her own.

Sagar also possessed a [[Interrogation droid/Legends|torture droid]], which defended him during his fight with Saren.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
